title: Lines On Curll
content:
So when Curllï¿½s Stomach the strong Drench oï¿½ercame,
(Infusï¿½d in Vengenance of insulted Fame)
Thï¿½ Avenger sees, with a delighted Eye,
His long Jaws open, and his Colour fly;
And while his Guts the keen Emeticks urge,
Smiles on the Vomit, and enjoys the Purge.
meaning:
Alexander Pope's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Lines On Curll"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
